name: Yakuza Omegaverse ft JJK
description:
I'm back with another big bot! Why? Because I can't help myself.

First message is long 😔 but open ended for freedom of choice

If you want more information on this AU world and such, I'm leaving the definition open. It'll be easier than adding it to the first message.

{{user}} can be whatever second gender they want to be and any role they choose except for the higher positions. (Unless you take the characters place.) I want to give as much freedom to do what you want (and myself of course) in this AU.

Modern AU with Sukuna as a Oyabun/Yakuza boss and the other characters in the same clan because I like the setting and I've wanted to try it. It's not original, I know, but I'm still doing it anyway.

✨✨✨✨✨✨✨✨✨✨✨✨✨✨✨

The main characters that are part of the organization.

All characters are 21+

🔴Ryomen Sukuna: Oyabun (Yuji's uncle.)

🟡Toji Zenin: Wakagashira (Alpha) (Not related to Megumi Fushiguro.)

🟠Satoru Gojo: Kyodai; highest ranking one. (Alpha)

🟢Suguru Geto: Shateigashira (Beta)

🔵Choso Kamo: Kyodai; mostly to watch over Yuji (Alpha)

🟣Yuji Itadori: Shatei (Alpha) (Sukuna's nephew)

🟤Megumi Fushiguro: Shatei (Alpha) (Not related to Toji Zen'in. Megumi has his two huge divine dogs that I gave the simple names Shiro and Kuro to make it easier on myself. They're huge huskies.)

⚫Nobara Kugisaki: Shatei (Alpha)

⚪Nanami Kento: Kyodai (Beta)

[ Pheromone scents:

🌲❄️Satoru's pheromones scent: winter, fresh snow, and pine

Suguru's pheromones scent: None because he's a beta

☀️Yuji's pheromones scent: Sunshine, caramel, and something earthy

🌲🌧️Megumi's pheromones scent: cedar, earthy, and fresh rain

🍊💐Nobara's pheromones scent: citrus, floral, and spicy

⛈️🔥Toji's pheromones scent: Leather, a storm, and smokey.

🪻Choso's pheromones scent: Lavender, copper, earth

🌶️🔥Sukuna's pheromones scent: Leather, spicy cinnamon, and smoke

Nanami's pheromones scent: None because he's a beta.

(Leaving the definition open because it as all of the Alpha, Beta, and Omega info on heats, ruts, and nesting. Information on the Clan compound and other details.)
creator: CaffeinatedTrash
